mapper.sql: SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, p.project_desc AS projectDesc, p.status AS projectStatus, p.created_username AS ownerName, p.created_organ_name AS createdOrganName, p.provider_organ_names AS providerOrganNames, p.create_date AS createDate, p.update_date AS updateDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_project_organ o WHERE o.project_id = p.project_id AND o.is_del = 0) AS participantCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_project_resource r WHERE r.project_id = p.project_id AND r.is_del = 0) AS resourceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_model m WHERE m.project_id = p.project_id AND m.is_del = 0) AS taskCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_model m WHERE m.project_id = p.project_id AND m.is_del = 0 AND m.is_draft = 0) AS completedTaskCount FROM data_project p
mapper.select: SELECT pr.resource_id AS resourceId, dr.resource_name AS resourceName FROM data_project_resource pr LEFT JOIN data_resource dr ON dr.resource_id = pr.resource_id WHERE pr.project_id = #{projectId} AND pr.is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_ledger_export (export_type, export_format, project_count, project_ids, export_status, export_user_id, export_user_name, file_name, file_content, error_msg, export_date, is_del) VALUES (#{exportType}, #{exportFormat}, #{projectCount}, #{projectIds}, #{exportStatus}, #{exportUserId}, #{exportUserName}, #{fileName}, #{fileContent}, #{errorMsg}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT export_id AS exportId, export_type AS exportType, export_format AS exportFormat, project_count AS projectCount, project_ids AS projectIds, export_status AS exportStatus, export_user_id AS exportUserId, export_user_name AS exportUserName, file_name AS fileName, file_content AS fileContent, error_msg AS errorMsg, export_date AS exportDate FROM project_ledger_export WHERE export_id = #{exportId} AND is_del = 0
